$comment: Gridmark Project Template — Fill this in to define a grid layout, then load it into the app.

symbols.$comment: Each symbol the grid can reference. 'id' must be unique across all symbols. 'width' is the span in cells (1–20). 'svgFile' is the path relative to src/svgs/ (used by the directory). 'svgContent' is the raw inline SVG string (used at runtime). Provide at least one of svgFile or svgContent.
symbols.name: Dot
symbols.svgContent: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 100 100"><circle cx="50" cy="50" r="30" fill="#333"/></svg>

symbols.name: Long Arrow
symbols.svgContent: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 200 100"><line x1="8" y1="50" x2="192" y2="50" stroke="#333" stroke-width="10" stroke-linecap="round"/><polyline points="160,20 192,50 160,80" stroke="#333" stroke-width="10" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" fill="none"/></svg>

symbols.name: My Custom Symbol
symbols.svgContent: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 300 100"><rect x="10" y="10" width="280" height="80" rx="12" fill="#e94560"/></svg>

cells.$comment: Each entry places a symbol on the grid. 'row' and 'col' are the top-left cell (0-indexed). 'symbolId' must match an id from the symbols array above. 'spanWidth' is how many cells wide this placement is (must match the symbol's width). Only specify root cells — non-root span cells are derived automatically.

backgroundImage.$comment: Optional reference image. Set to null to omit. 'src' is a data URL or external URL. Position/size are in grid-cell units (fractional ok).

viewport.$comment: Optional initial camera position. 'offsetX/Y' are pixel offsets, 'zoom' is the scale factor (1 = 100%).
